description_long: A classic hamburger is presented on a rectangular wooden board alongside a generous serving of golden French fries. The hamburger features a soft, plain white bun with a slightly glossy top, enclosing layers of fresh green leaf lettuce, a slice of tomato, red onion rings, melted cheese, and a beef patty. The lettuce is crisp and abundant, spilling out from the sides, while the tomato and onion are neatly stacked beneath it. The fries are thin, lightly browned, and scattered next to the burger, some overlapping onto the bun. The wooden board has a light, natural grain, providing a rustic and appetizing presentation.
description: A hamburger with lettuce, tomato, onion, cheese, and a beef patty on a plain white bun, served with fries on a wooden board. The presentation is fresh and inviting, with vibrant toppings and golden fries.
description_view_0: The hamburger and fries are viewed from the side, showing the full bun, lettuce, and a pile of fries to the left.
description_view_1: A front-facing view highlights the hamburger's toppings, with lettuce, tomato, and onion visible, and fries partially in the background.
description_view_2: The side view displays the hamburger with the bun slightly lifted, revealing the cheese, onions, and a large portion of fries to the right.
description_view_3: The view from behind the fries shows the back of the hamburger, with lettuce spilling out and fries dominating the foreground.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered on top of the patty, followed by tomato and onion slices beneath, with cheese melted over the patty and toppings distributed evenly within the bun.
